description: Molecule catalog for QEncode Suite v3. Extends v2 with H2O, NH3, and LiH upgraded to 4e,4o active space. Geometry in Angstrom, PySCF format.

entries.notes: Full active space for STO-3G. 2 electrons, 2 spatial orbitals → 4 qubits (JW).
Upgraded from [2,2] in Suite v2. [4,4] captures Li 2s + H 1s + polarization orbitals. 8 qubits (JW). CASCI reference is active-space FCI, not full-system FCI.
[2,2] active space: HOMO (F 2p) + LUMO. 4 qubits (JW). Retained from Suite v2.
[4,4] active space: Be 2s + 2p + H 1s. 8 qubits (JW). Same as Suite v2 canonical.
NEW in Suite v3. [4,4] captures lone-pair + bonding correlation. 8 qubits (JW). Certified tier target.
NEW in Suite v3. [4,4] captures N lone pair + N-H bond correlation. C3v symmetry. 8 qubits (JW). Certified tier target.
Research tier. Triple bond requires beyond-UCCSD for chemical accuracy. [6,6] → 12 qubits (JW). Validated, not certified. Key DARPA QB-GSEE candidate.

Suite v3.2 Research+ tier. Ethylene (ethene), D2h symmetry, equilibrium geometry. [4,4] active space covers π and π* orbitals plus adjacent σ/σ* — the chemically relevant correlation. 16 total electrons; active space isolates the most correlated valence shell. Expected ~8–10 qubits (JW, tapered). UCCSD will not converge to certification threshold due to strong π-bond correlation; Research+ by design. Basis: 6-31G.
